spec.description: Fleet-level overview of all SNMP-monitored network devices. Aligns to the same metric naming and query patterns as the Network Device Detail dashboard.

spec.title: Device Status
spec.description: Per-device snapshot: CPU, interface up/down counts, and traffic. Click Device to open detail view.

spec.expression: SELECT A.device_name AS "Device", A.provider AS "Provider", B.__value__ AS "CPU", C.__value__ AS "If Up", D.__value__ AS "If Down", E.__value__ AS "Traffic In", F.__value__ AS "Traffic Out" FROM A LEFT JOIN B ON A.device_name = B.device_name LEFT JOIN C ON A.device_name = C.device_name LEFT JOIN D ON A.device_name = D.device_name LEFT JOIN E ON A.device_name = E.device_name LEFT JOIN F ON A.device_name = F.device_name ORDER BY B.__value__ DESC LIMIT 500

spec.title: Interfaces Down by Device
spec.description: Count of oper-down interfaces per device — high counts may indicate trunk failures or decommissioned ports

spec.title: Interface Up % by Device
spec.description: Percentage of interfaces in oper-up state per device. Low values flag bulk failures or decommissioned port blocks.

spec.title: Current CPU by Device
spec.description: Current CPU % per device, sorted descending

spec.title: CPU Utilization — Top 10 Devices
spec.description: CPU utilization over time for the top 10 busiest devices

spec.title: Total Fleet Traffic by Device (Stacked)
spec.description: Combined in+out traffic per device, stacked — use to identify which devices are driving aggregate spikes.

spec.title: Total Devices
spec.description: Unique devices reporting SNMP polling health

spec.title: Interfaces Down
spec.description: Count of interfaces currently in oper-down state across all devices

spec.title: Avg Fleet CPU
spec.description: Average of each device's max CPU — high values indicate broad fleet saturation

spec.title: Total Fleet Traffic
spec.description: Sum of inbound + outbound bits/sec across all device interfaces

spec.title: Total Devices Δ 24h
spec.description: Absolute change in reporting devices vs 24h ago. Negative means devices stopped polling.

spec.expr:
count(count by(device_name) (kentik_snmp_PollingHealth{provider=~"$provider",device_name=~"$device_name"}))
- (
  count(count by(device_name) (kentik_snmp_PollingHealth{provider=~"$provider",device_name=~"$device_name"} offset 24h))
  or
  count(count by(device_name) (kentik_snmp_PollingHealth{provider=~"$provider",device_name=~"$device_name"}))
)

spec.title: Interfaces Down Δ 24h
spec.description: Absolute change in fleet-wide down interface count vs 24h ago. Positive = more outages.

spec.expr:
(count(kentik_snmp_if_OperStatus{provider=~"$provider",device_name=~"$device_name",if_AdminStatus!="down"} == 2) or vector(0))
- (
  (count(kentik_snmp_if_OperStatus{provider=~"$provider",device_name=~"$device_name",if_AdminStatus!="down"} offset 24h == 2) or vector(0))
  or
  (count(kentik_snmp_if_OperStatus{provider=~"$provider",device_name=~"$device_name",if_AdminStatus!="down"} == 2) or vector(0))
)

spec.title: Avg Fleet CPU Δ 24h
spec.description: Change in average fleet CPU vs 24h ago. Positive = fleet is busier than yesterday.

spec.expr:
avg(max by(device_name) (kentik_snmp_CPU{provider=~"$provider",device_name=~"$device_name"}))
- (
  avg(max by(device_name) (kentik_snmp_CPU{provider=~"$provider",device_name=~"$device_name"} offset 24h))
  or
  avg(max by(device_name) (kentik_snmp_CPU{provider=~"$provider",device_name=~"$device_name"}))
)

spec.title: Fleet Traffic Δ 24h
spec.description: Change in total fleet traffic (bps) vs 24h ago. Zero indicates no change or data unavailable.

spec.title: Traffic In — Top 10 Devices (Stacked)
spec.description: Inbound traffic (bps) over time for the top 10 devices by volume

spec.title: Traffic Out — Top 10 Devices (Stacked)
spec.description: Outbound traffic (bps) over time for the top 10 devices by volume

spec.title: 00. Network Device Summary
